untranslatable_reason: Signal requires confirmation from three separate market indices (Industrials, Transportation, Utilities). The allowed indicator set does not include individual index price data or a multi-index confirmation function. A backtest engine would need access to separate OHLCV feeds for each major average to validate the '2 of 3' confirmation rule. Only the volume requirement can be directly translated.
translation_notes: Translated only the volume component of the signal (volume increases as trend develops). The core requirement—two of three major averages confirming direction—cannot be implemented without access to individual index data streams. A complete implementation would require custom data source integration or pre-computed confirmation flags for each index.
